User.title: User Profile
User.description: Information about a registered user, their subscription status, and journaling streaks.

lastEntryDate.description: ISO date of the last entry made.

lastStreakFreezeUsedMonth.description: The YYYY-MM when the streak freeze was last used.

Memory.title: Daily Memory
Memory.description: A single journal entry with AI-generated narrative and optional photo.

/users/{userId}.description: User profile data for individual users.

/users/{userId}/memories/{memoryId}.description: Personal timeline of daily memories for a specific user.
